__schema0.description: Identifier for the transform. This identifier can contain lowercase alphanumeric characters (a-z and 0-9), hyphens, and underscores. It has a 64 character limit and must start and end with alphanumeric characters.

__schema2.description: If this value is `true`, the transform is reset regardless of its current state. If it's `false`, the transform must be stopped before it can be reset.

__schema4.description: Period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
